feed.title: sakkamade
feed.subtitle: through life with yuri in heart

entry.title: Episode 33. When Mother is Pervert and Lunatic.

link.title: Episode 33. When Mother is Pervert and Lunatic.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Noah found esplanade​, finished mapping it, and now was waiting for Lydia and Ohan at the designated spot nigh the Woodland. It was around noon.

entry.title: Episode 32. Confined Lydia.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Lady, who invited Lydia to the lodge, introduced herself as Hinagiku. At present, Lydia sitting upon one-person sofa. For Hinagiku said, ‘I’ll fetch a drink,’ she withdrew to within the house. Incidentally, Ohan awaiting outside. Lydia restlessly peered over the lodge. Lodge is very simple and frugal. There were bare minimum, necessary for life. That is: sofa, table, and bed. Along with, probably, a simple Food Maker and Recycling Box, which placed within depth of the dwelling, speculated Lydia. Lodge ceiling is awfully tall, and, being Ohan to get through the entrance, he would be able rise inside. Upon Lydia swam her gaze to the table, she found an emerald green sphere locked up in the vial​. Lydia tilted her head. What is this-? For her never seen before such kind of object, Lydia gathered the tablet from within her backpack, which placed upon the floor, took a picture of vial with its camera, and searched it up. The hit was a cultivation method of growing moss, denoted as terrarium.

entry.title: Episode 31. Knock on the Door.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Upon validation the outside world being destroyed, LM series Type・Ⅱ activated the private power generator, whereafter resumed indifferently doing her regular duty. She is an Autodoll, and is has no qualia. Accordingly, even if the world is vanished, she will feel nothing. Lady merely bore an information apropos of world’s doom. No emotions had keep it a company. She organised the books, burnished the floor, and polished the walls. Also, lady was reviewing various equipment, making a phone calls to the readers who did not return the book even post due date. Surely, no one answered. Lady had been doing so, continuously, for years. She monitored the weather every day, in case for readers to visit. Such is to welcome visitors with a smile, saying: “The weather is nice today, isn’t it.”

entry.title: Episode 30. Library Side.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: When Rapha woke up​, ceiling was very high. She could not grasp where she was, for a moment.

entry.title: Episode 29. Value of Life.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: “Hey, Lydiko. Have you thought you could go on exploration leaving me behind?”

entry.title: Episode 28. Resurrection of Apricot and Whereabouts of Wager.

link.title: Episode 28. Resurrection of Apricot and Whereabouts of Wager.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Lydia, Rapha, and Yuuyami skinned Apricot’s artificial skin, and replaced some parts. Whereafter, they applied a new artificial skin, and changed colour of her hair to blue. Since Rapha declared: ‘Wah, it’s uncomfortable for SA series to resemble onee-chama,’ hair colour was changed to the degree when she can obtain a peace of mind. Apropos, we have not hitherto dressed her.

entry.title: Episode 27. Lydia and Ohan.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Ohan easily carried Apricot under his arm​. As expected,​ Ohan truly is powerful-, thought Lydia.

entry.title: Episode 26. Rapha and Yuuyami.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Upon the parched​ land was retching Rapha.

entry.title: Episode 25. Please Love.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: “What? By what means are you carrying that thing​?”

entry.title: Episode 24. Apricot of Woodland.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: As they proceed deeper the Woodland, quite soon Lydia lost a sense of direction. Despite daytime, Woodland was dim; the atmosphere felt chilly as though. Furthermore​, ground was bumpy that arduous to walk. Overall, such ominous place stimulated a human fear. Consequently, Lydia,
